jobDescription: Welcome to MOO – our purpose is simple: great design for everyone. Want to join us? We’re award-winning, design-led, technology-driven and powered by some pretty awesome people. You might be one of them.  Our Platform team focuses on the Infrastructure and applications utilised across our different multi-disciplinary teams, and right now we’re looking for an Operations Engineer I to join our growing team. You’re a quick learner and have an appreciation for Operations Engineering in a Linux environment and are looking to develop yourself further in the field. You’ll be excited about learning new technology such as Kubernetes, Ansible, Terraform, Prometheus and more. As a keen collaborator you’ll enjoy working with the larger Platform team as well as many different software development teams. You’ll work closely with other teams and departments to help us build and support the tools and infrastructure needed to give customers a great MOO experience. We’re big believers in Infrastructure as Code and will be looking for your help to build up and roll out a Platform as a Service with focus on maintainability, resilience, performance and efficiency. Responsibilities Together with your team you will be responsible for keeping MOO systems up and running 24/7 Working with your team to implement and roll-out tools and infrastructure to support other teams Actively seek to improve process, tooling, architecture across MOOWork towards joining the on-call rotation by effectively investigating, mitigating and resolving service impacting events Desirable skills Public cloud services such as AWSExperience with Configuration Management Tools (ideally Ansible, Terraform or similar) Scripting languages Understanding of containers (ideally Docker ecosystem) Dev Ops culture and processes Supporting development teams Nice to haves A good understanding of agile software development practices Experience of using Test Driven Development Java and/or Python development languages Previous experience working for an e-commerce business Knowledge of monitoring and alerting technologies
